title: Please and Thank You Story for Kids | Kids Cartoon #shorts
description:
TOOT TOOT! The toy train rolls FAST to Benny!
A gentle moral lesson story where Benny practices please and thank you.
Toddlers learn polite words, kindness, and friendship through cartoon play.
Safe preschool story for ages 2-8 in American English.
#shorts #kidssongs #preschool #toddler
